text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's heeeere! My second summer<n>camp! There's
no time for fan comics<n>this year. I gotta train, train,
train!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've got some breaking news from<n>King.
Apparently, my top oshi from the<n>younger classes
will also be running<n>in the upcoming autumn Tenno
Sho!<n>Yesss!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna take what I learned about determination from King and share itwith this younger racer. Gasp! It'llbe like I'm her big sister! I have to domy best so I'm ready for this fall!
